title: Spelling: Encode One-Syllable Words - Read and Record 2
learning_goal: Learner can encode one-syllable words through a short guided read and record activity.
mastery_rule: Mastered at accuracy >= 0.85, prompt_level <= 2, across 2 completed sessions
remediation_trigger: Route to targeted mini-teach if accuracy < 0.70 after 5 items, consecutive_same_error_count >= 2, or response_time_seconds > baseline_average_response_time_seconds * 1.50 and accuracy == 1.0
extension_unlock: Unlock challenge when accuracy >= 0.90, prompt_level <= 1, and response_time_seconds <= baseline_average_response_time_seconds * 1.10

items.prompt_text: Read and record: I can read the word before in a clear sentence.
items.prompt_audio_text: Read aloud clearly, then record your voice. Read and record: I can read the word before in a clear sentence.
items.correct_answer: I can read the word before in a clear sentence.

feedback.incorrect: Try again. Listen once more, use the hint, and choose carefully.
feedback.hint: Look for the clue linked to encode one-syllable words.

interventions_by_error_type.fluency_or_pronunciation: Mini-teach: model one example of encode one-syllable words, practise one guided item, then return to the task.
interventions_by_error_type.slow_correct: Praise accuracy, remove time pressure, and build fluency with two repeated examples.
interventions_by_error_type.multiple_attempts: Reduce choices to two and replay the audio prompt.

accessibility.caption_text: Read and record: I can read the word before in a clear sentence.
